pain_points.pain: The user wants a short walk but still has to choose isolated quest cards one by one.
pain_points.next_version_solution: Micro-Safari Trail Plan bundles three quests into a short local plan.

pain_points.pain: The user may not know what counts as a good non-species observation.
pain_points.next_version_solution: Noticing Rubric gives texture, edge, motion, color, sound, and pattern examples.

pain_points.pain: Saved postcards are useful records but do not yet create a repeatable reflection loop.
pain_points.next_version_solution: Trail Almanac creates weekly habitat recap, color swatches, and next habitat prompts.

pain_points.pain: Parent-child or walking-buddy use is implied but not explicitly supported.
pain_points.next_version_solution: Two-Person Quest Mode adds Spotter and Storyteller role prompts without accounts.

pain_points.pain: Premium packs need clearer experiential value before purchase.
pain_points.next_version_solution: Seasonal Field Pack Preview shows sample quest chains and visual territory while keeping free core open.

privacy_boundaries: no cloud AI or Kimi key
